subtasks.description: Generate a multi-tool orchestration plan to: (1) retrieve project requirements from Jira API, (2) check team availability from calendar API, (3) schedule standup meeting via calendar, and (4) share agenda via Slack API. Include tool sequencing, payload construction, and error handling for cross-team collaboration.

plan.cost_rationale: This query explicitly requests orchestration across FOUR distinct external tools (Jira, Calendar API, Calendar scheduling, Slack) with sequential dependencies: requirements must be retrieved before agenda can be drafted, availability must be checked before scheduling, and agenda must be finalized before Slack notification. This is exactly the use case for multitool_plan. A single mid-tier call can generate the complete tool invocation sequence, payload templates, and dependency graph. No separate subtasks needed—multitool_plan produces a comprehensive orchestration workflow covering all four tool interactions in one output.
